title: austroeupatorium albescens
intro: Austroeupatorium albescens, also known as White Snakeroot, is a perennial plant native to eastern North America, belonging to the family Asteraceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which help to reduce pain, fever, and inflammation. The health benefits of Austroeupatorium albescens include its ability to aid in the relief of colds, flu, and other respiratory issues, as well as its potential to support the immune system. Austroeupatorium albescens is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, and it can also be used in tincture or poultice form, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential toxic effects when ingested in large quantities.
